title: Opening for Production Engineer at Nocil

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Nocil
jsonLd.description:
Nocil has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Nocil:
Nocil is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nocil!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
